chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Const. Petition No.D-4728 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections 6 and 20 2. For orders on Misc. No.21041/2024 (Exp/A) 3. For hearing of main case ---------------------------------------------- 07.10.2025 None present for petitioner ------------------------------ This petition was filed on 25.09.2024. No one has appeared for the petitioner since last one year. Today also, despite lapse of more than one year, no one is in attendance on behalf of the petitioner, without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition, which is hereby dismissed for non-prosecution along with all pending application(s). HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES J U D G E Gulsher/PS
